title: BOLSIUS Honeycomb Rustic Shine Pillar Candle 8cm x 7cm
description: Product description About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 8cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave burning candle unattended. Monitor burn time to prevent the flame from reaching the bottom of the container. Always extinguish candles when leaving the room or going to sleep.
